note: Display metadata for item ids that are not blocks (drops, gear icons). Blocks keep their names in blocks.json; this file backfills everything else for the FQ-09 icon grids. color is the FQ-07 fallback swatch (hex, no #).

dirt.description: Soft ground. Quick to place, quick to mine.

ore.description: Raw ore. Needs a tier-2 pick.

tin_ore.description: A common metal ore; alloys with copper.

iron_ore.description: A deeper ore. Needs a tier-2 pick.

silver_ore.description: A deep, precious ore. Needs a tier-2 pick.

crystal.description: A deep, faceted crystal. Needs a tier-2 pick.

copper_ingot.description: Smelted at the furnace. Alloys into bronze.

tin_ingot.description: Smelted at the furnace. Alloys into bronze.

iron_ingot.description: Smelted at the furnace. Anvil stock for iron gear.

bronze_ingot.description: Alloyed from copper and tin at the furnace.

crop_seeds.description: Plant on tilled soil (G) to grow food.

farm_soil.description: Tilled earth. Crops grow on it.

crop_seedling.description: A young crop. Give it time.

crop_ripe.description: Harvest (mine) for food and a seed.

thorn_quill.description: A barbed quill from a thornrat.

ore_flecks.description: Metal residue scraped from an ore tick.

shell.description: The hard shell of an ore tick.

oil_rags.description: Oily rags from a torchbearer. Raid fuel.
